{{Quote|I love the way people look at me when I am dancing. They get this funny look on their face. I guess it changes based on what I'm wearing. I like to think that I inspire them to do great things.|O'choa Detera|<ref name="SWG:TPS" />}}
'''O'choa Detera''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] dancer who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Isn't O'choa the most beautiful woman in the Galaxy? Never have I seen such agility and grace, I am truly smitten.|[[Mot Draken]]|<ref name="SWG:TPS" />}}
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], O'choa Detera was part of a [[Unidentified Bright Jewel system band|band]] that performed in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. The band also included another dancer, [[Mestral]], and three [[Musician/Legends|musicians]], [[Alisia (Human)|Alisia]], [[Alitra]] and [[Mako (musician)|Mako]]. During that time, the band often played music and danced for the patrons of the [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]] of [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]]<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> and [[Nova Orion Station]], two [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the Bright Jewel system.<ref name="SWG:NOS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|Nova Orion Station}}</ref>

By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a man named [[Mot Draken]] fell deeply in love with O'choa Detera while visiting Tansarii Point Station. He then decided to stay on the station. Nevertheless, although he patronized the Tansarii Point's cantina for two years, he never had the courage to talk to her and share his feelings. Then, O'choa finally understood why Draken still remained on the station but she instead had a crush on [[Bun'Del]], one of Mot's friends.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

==Behind the scenes==
O'choa Detera was a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> O'choa Detera and her band were added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> The "New Player Tutorial" featured the band in the cantina of [[W:c:swg:Tansarii Point Station|Tansarii Point Station]].<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> With the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 8 Notes for Jan 15 2008|Chapter 8]]," on [[January 15]], [[2008]],<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter 8: The Nova Orion Crisis">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67563&month=012008|text=Chapter 8: The Nova Orion Crisis}}</ref> O'choa Detera and the band were also included in the cantina of the [[W:c:swg:Nova Orion Station|Nova Orion Station]].<ref name="SWG:NOS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|Nova Orion Station}}</ref>
